title: Hexable: A Hexerei Sable compability mod
description: This mod adds support between Hexerei and Sable
body:
[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/M4M01JIT22)

Hexable
# Help me improve this mod! 
[Join my Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/6wRDwVuBbB)

Hexable is a compatibility mod for Hexerei and Sable on NeoForge 1.21.1.

This mod fixes several issues that occur when Hexerei content is used inside Sable sub-levels and moving structures.
